title: The Vibe in the Crypto Market Right Now: ‘Stay Alive’
title_cn: 当前加密货币市场的氛围：“活下去”

paragraphs.cn: 美国东部时间2026年1月31日中午12:00

paragraphs.en: The party in the crypto market is starting to feel like a distant memory.
paragraphs.cn: 加密货币市场的狂欢开始感觉像遥远的记忆。

paragraphs.en: After a disappointing end to 2025, major cryptocurrencies have languished to start the new year. Bitcoin has shed roughly one-third of its value since hitting a record high in October through Friday, and sank further on Saturday.
paragraphs.cn: 在2025年令人失望的收尾之后，主要加密货币在新的一年开始时表现低迷。自去年10月创下历史新高以来，比特币截至周五已下跌约三分之一，周六进一步下跌。

paragraphs.en:

paragraphs.cn: 订阅《华尔街日报》以继续阅读您的文章

vocabulary.meaning_en: A person's emotional state or the atmosphere of a place as communicated to and felt by others.
vocabulary.example: The Vibe in the Crypto Market Right Now: ‘Stay Alive’.
vocabulary.example_cn: 当前加密货币市场的氛围：“活下去”。

vocabulary.meaning_en: The market for cryptocurrencies, which are digital or virtual currencies secured by cryptography.
vocabulary.example: The party in the crypto market is starting to feel like a distant memory.
vocabulary.example_cn: 加密货币市场的狂欢开始感觉像遥远的记忆。

vocabulary.meaning_en: Something that happened a long time ago and is now difficult to remember clearly.
vocabulary.example: The party in the crypto market is starting to feel like a distant memory.
vocabulary.example_cn: 加密货币市场的狂欢开始感觉像遥远的记忆。

vocabulary.meaning_en: Failing to fulfill one's hopes or expectations.
vocabulary.example: After a disappointing end to 2025, major cryptocurrencies have languished to start the new year.
vocabulary.example_cn: 在2025年令人失望的收尾之后，主要加密货币在新的一年开始时表现低迷。

vocabulary.example: After a disappointing end to 2025, major cryptocurrencies have languished to start the new year.
vocabulary.example_cn: 在2025年令人失望的收尾之后，主要加密货币在新的一年开始时表现低迷。

vocabulary.meaning_en: A digital currency in which transactions are verified and records maintained by a decentralized system using cryptography, rather than by a centralized authority.
vocabulary.example: After a disappointing end to 2025, major cryptocurrencies have languished to start the new year.
vocabulary.example_cn: 在2025年令人失望的收尾之后，主要加密货币在新的一年开始时表现低迷。

vocabulary.meaning_en: (Of a person or thing) lose or lack vitality; grow weak or feeble. (In this context: suffered from being forced to remain in an unpleasant place or situation)
vocabulary.example: After a disappointing end to 2025, major cryptocurrencies have languished to start the new year.
vocabulary.example_cn: 在2025年令人失望的收尾之后，主要加密货币在新的一年开始时表现低迷。

vocabulary.meaning_en: Get rid of (something undesirable or superfluous). (In this context: lost)
vocabulary.example: Bitcoin has shed roughly one-third of its value since hitting a record high in October through Friday, and sank further on Saturday.
vocabulary.example_cn: 自去年10月创下历史新高以来，比特币截至周五已下跌约三分之一，周六进一步下跌。
